detaileddescription.para: Extracts and orders the compartments associated with a given reac.

briefdescription.para: Returns Function, if any, acting as src of specified msg into pa.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Element *e, Id myCompt, vector< Id > &poolCompts, map< Id, Id > &poolComptMap)
memberdef.name: isOffSolverReac

detaileddescription.para: Checks if specified reac is off solver. As side-effect it compiles a vector of the pools that are off-solver, and the corresponding compartments for those pools
